notes: Executor flagged streaming concerns: tool calls flushed at message_stop (not content_block_stop), findActiveToolCall heuristic. CQR confirmed but PASS — functionally correct for migration milestone.

notes: CQR flagged stubbed provider routing (intentional per plan), API key empty fallback, incomplete retryable detection, no streaming retry. All are design choices or deferred items. PASS.

action: Added 2 loadConfig tests to existing tests/config.test.ts. 10 tests pass (8 ModelRegistry + 2 loadConfig).
notes: Simple test addition task. No CQR issues.

action: Migrated intent classification with LLM + keyword fallback. Added best-effort hook support with try/catch and console.warn. CQR iterated 3 times: hook blocking → hook latency → observability.
notes: CQR round 1: hooks.block classification on failure (HIGH). Round 2: fire-and-forget blocks on slow hooks. Round 3: silent error swallowing loses observability. Final fix: await hooks in try/catch with console.warn. 34 tests pass.

action: Created evaluate_complexity() with word-count + keyword-based scoring, and selectModel() for intent/complexity-based model routing. 24 new tests covering all complexity levels and routing paths. 58 total tests pass.
Migrated evaluate_complexity and selectModel functions. 24 new tests added. CQR noted hard-coded Claude models (spec-defined) and unused fallbackModel (reserved).
notes: CQR flagged hard-coded Claude model names and unused fallbackModel — both are spec-defined. Implementation matches spec exactly. 58 router tests pass.

task_title: 迁移 Orchestrator 接口和状态

notes: CQR noted nullable fields (spec-defined), unused OrchestratorState (will be used in Task 4), duplicate HookRegistry (intentional pattern). All forward-looking concerns.

action: Migrated StateMachineOrchestrator with run() and runStream(). CQR found hook crash (HIGH) and payload mismatch (HIGH). Fixed both: try/catch on all hooks, { tool, args } payload. 18 orchestrator tests, 134 total.
notes: CQR round 1: hook crash + payload mismatch. Fixed try/catch + { tool, args }. Round 2: stale code review (plan snippet). Accepted as PASS.

action: Migrated Tool interface, BaseTool abstract class, and ToolRunner implementing ToolRunnerProtocol. 12 capability tests. TDD: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR confirmed.
notes: CQR: approve, no material findings. 112 total tests pass.

action: Migrated CalculatorTool with recursive descent parser. CQR round 1: DoS + malformed numbers. Round 2: parenthesis depth not covered. Round 3: PASS. All recursion paths bounded (exponent, unary, primary/parentheses). 36 capability tests.
notes: 3 CQR rounds. Round 1: unbounded recursion + malformed numbers. Round 2: parsePrimary missing depth check. Round 3: approve.

action: Migrated WeatherTool with mock data for 5 cities. 8 new tests covering all cities, unknown city, missing param, and ToolRunner integration. 46 capability tests, 180 total.
notes: Straightforward migration. TDD RED-GREEN cycle confirmed. No CQR concerns.

action: Migrated WeatherTool with mock data. CQR: case-insensitive lookup, input validation, throw vs return. Fixed all. CQR round 4 flagged orchestrator run() error handling (out of scope). 51 capability tests, 185 total.
notes: 4 CQR rounds. Rounds 1-2: case/validation. Round 3: throw vs return (fixed both tools). Round 4: orchestrator run() error handling — out of scope, deferred.

task_title: Calculator Tool — throw vs return fix
action: Updated CalculatorTool to throw errors instead of returning error strings, consistent with best practice. Updated 12 tests.
notes: Best practice fix: tools should throw, not return error strings. Orchestrator run() still catches and feeds back to LLM — design choice for agentic loop.

action: Migrated FileReadTool with sandbox. CQR: symlink parent bypass, TOCTOU race, byte-size limit. Fixed all 3. 18 file-tools tests, 203 total.
notes: 2 CQR rounds. Round 1: 3 security issues (realpath, TOCTOU, byte-size). Round 2: PASS. Codex quota exceeded, used Claude subagent for CQR round 2.

task_title: 迁移 File Write + File Edit Tools
action: Migrated FileWriteTool and FileEditTool with realpath containment, atomic writes, uniqueness validation. CQR: PASS with $-pattern fix. 54 file-tools tests, 239 total.
notes: CQR PASS. Fixed $-pattern interpretation in String.replace (use function replacement). Minor: no parent dir fsync, predictable temp path, no writeSync return check.
